egress: field_monitor.check_log — append-only, written by CF Workers

summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into the Blog sub-hub as Signal Sweep. Add bridge logic under hubs/blog-content/imo/middle/signal_sweep/ that reads field_monitor.check_log vendor-tier changes and feeds the existing blog pipeline via ingest_article() without modifying the existing pipeline, seed 100 vendor.blog URLs into field_monitor.url_registry/field_state, and update pipeline.md plus SCHEMA.md.
routing_notes: Reissued from planner intake signal-sweep-blog-bcd090e8-97d9-453f-87d9-84774f5b0e4e.json. Supersedes the earlier DB-only framing by carrying the full code, DB seed, and documentation scope through to Builder.

constraints: Do not modify existing blog pipeline (blog_node_spoke.py, ingest_article.py)
field_monitor.* bridge reads only; never writes
Kill switches KILL_SIGNAL_SWEEP and KILL_BLOG_URL_SEED enforced
Depends on field_monitor schema being deployed first
